title: achillea kraettliana
intro: Achillea kraettliana, also known as the white yarrow or common yarrow, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, making it a popular remedy for wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Achillea kraettliana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and improve respiratory problems, such as colds and flu. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
